creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=06df180a9e39055026499a326ef67812801a8919

commit 06df180a9e39055026499a326ef67812801a8919
Author:     Rodrigo Osorio <rodrigo@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2023-11-06 08:24:43 +0000
Commit:     Rodrigo Osorio <rodrigo@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-11-06 10:03:47 +0000

    */*: Update WWW to use HTTPS for sourceforge.net projects

    Homepage link is permanent redirected to its HTTPS counterpart
    Issue reported by repology : https://repology.org/repository/freebsd/problems

    Approved by:    portmgr (blanket)
    PR:             274888
